title: Anathallis bertoniensis
taxonomy: Anathallis bertoniensis is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants, comprising approximately 30,000 known species. Anathallis bertoniensis is a species of orchid and is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae. This subfamily includes most of the species within the Orchidaceae family and is characterized by having a single ovary and three sepals. The specific classification of Anathallis bertoniensis is within the tribe Epidendreae.
